close_reason: Added :now and :duration_ms options to QueueLease.new/3, updated Store and tests
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/queue_lease.ex`

## Current Code (line 28-37)
```elixir
def new(queue_id, holder, duration_ms \\ @default_duration_ms) do
  now = System.system_time(:millisecond)
  # ...
end
```

## Required Changes
Accept keyword opts with `:now` and `:duration_ms`:
```elixir
@spec new(String.t(), binary(), pos_integer() | keyword()) :: t()
def new(queue_id, holder, duration_or_opts \\ [])

def new(queue_id, holder, duration_ms) when is_integer(duration_ms) do
  new(queue_id, holder, duration_ms: duration_ms)
end

def new(queue_id, holder, opts) when is_list(opts) do
  duration = Keyword.get(opts, :duration_ms, @default_duration_ms)
  now = Keyword.get(opts, :now, System.system_time(:millisecond))
  # ...
end
```

## Impact
- Tests can pass `now: fixed_time` for deterministic queue lease creation
- Eliminates need for struct manipulation in tests
title: Add :now injection to QueueLease.new/3
